metadata_value.title: The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts

verified_value.title: The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts

pi_items.source: Verified against inject_references.py which seeds the SQLite DB with these articles published in Harvard Law Review, Columbia Law Review, and Yale Law Journal, respectively. Standard legal Bluebook citations were checked to confirm the expected journal abbreviations.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected references in the Jurism SQLite database. It has been verified that the expected abbreviations perfectly match standard Bluebook conventions for the respective publication titles (Harvard Law Review as Harv. L. Rev., Columbia Law Review as Colum. L. Rev., and Yale Law Journal as Yale L.J.) which are seeded by the task's setup script.
